title: Aquamirae
description: Ship graveyard with terrible deep sea creatures!
body:
###
Aquamirae expands your world with a frozen ocean biome – the Ice Maze above and a haunting Ship Graveyard beneath. Discover its unique ecosystem, progression, ambience, and lore as you uncover the fate of Captain Cornelia and survive the horrors lurking below the ice.


### “ 𝘛𝘩𝘦 𝘰𝘯𝘤𝘦 𝘦𝘯𝘥𝘭𝘦𝘴𝘴 𝘰𝘤𝘦𝘢𝘯, 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘸𝘢𝘵𝘦𝘳𝘴 𝘰𝘧 𝘸𝘩𝘪𝘤𝘩 𝘸𝘦𝘳𝘦 𝘳𝘢𝘪𝘴𝘦𝘥 𝘧𝘳𝘰𝘮 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘥𝘦𝘱𝘵𝘩𝘴 𝘣𝘺 𝘨𝘶𝘴𝘵𝘺 𝘸𝘪𝘯𝘥𝘴, 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘰𝘤𝘦𝘢𝘯 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘸𝘢𝘴 𝘴𝘢𝘪𝘭𝘦𝘥 𝘣𝘺 𝘣𝘳𝘢𝘷𝘦 𝘷𝘰𝘺𝘢𝘨𝘦𝘳𝘴 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘧𝘦𝘢𝘳𝘴𝘰𝘮𝘦 𝘧𝘭𝘰𝘵𝘪𝘭𝘭𝘢𝘴 𝘰𝘧 𝘱𝘪𝘭𝘭𝘢𝘨𝘦𝘳𝘴, 𝘪𝘴 𝘯𝘰𝘸 𝘤𝘩𝘢𝘪𝘯𝘦𝘥 𝘪𝘯 𝘪𝘤𝘦 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘴𝘯𝘰𝘸. ### 𝘍𝘳𝘰𝘻𝘦𝘯 𝘪𝘯 𝘵𝘪𝘮𝘦… 𝘛𝘩𝘦 𝘴𝘩𝘪𝘱𝘴 𝘰𝘧 𝘵𝘩𝘰𝘴𝘦 𝘸𝘩𝘰 𝘸𝘦𝘳𝘦 𝘶𝘯𝘭𝘶𝘤𝘬𝘺 𝘧𝘳𝘰𝘻𝘦 𝘪𝘯 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘮𝘦𝘳𝘤𝘪𝘭𝘦𝘴𝘴 𝘪𝘤𝘦, 𝘢𝘵 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘴𝘢𝘮𝘦 𝘮𝘰𝘮𝘦𝘯𝘵 𝘵𝘦𝘳𝘳𝘪𝘣𝘭𝘦 𝘤𝘳𝘦𝘢𝘵𝘶𝘳𝘦𝘴 𝘤𝘳𝘢𝘸𝘭𝘦𝘥 𝘰𝘶𝘵 𝘰𝘧 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘢𝘣𝘺𝘴𝘴 𝘪𝘯𝘵𝘰 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘭𝘪𝘨𝘩𝘵 𝘰𝘧 𝘥𝘢𝘺. 𝘛𝘩𝘳𝘰𝘶𝘨𝘩 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘣𝘭𝘪𝘻𝘻𝘢𝘳𝘥, 𝘰𝘯𝘭𝘺 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘳𝘢𝘳𝘦 𝘴𝘰𝘶𝘯𝘥𝘴 𝘰𝘧 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘩𝘰𝘳𝘯𝘴 𝘰𝘧 𝘵𝘩𝘰𝘴𝘦 𝘸𝘩𝘰 𝘴𝘵𝘪𝘭𝘭 𝘩𝘰𝘱𝘦 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘳𝘦𝘴𝘤𝘶𝘦 𝘢𝘳𝘦 𝘩𝘦𝘢𝘳𝘥. 𝘞𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘤𝘰𝘶𝘭𝘥 𝘵𝘳𝘢𝘯𝘴𝘧𝘰𝘳𝘮 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘰𝘯𝘤𝘦 𝘶𝘯𝘣𝘳𝘪𝘥𝘭𝘦𝘥 𝘰𝘤𝘦𝘢𝘯 𝘴𝘰 𝘥𝘳𝘢𝘴𝘵𝘪𝘤𝘢𝘭𝘭𝘺? ”

The Ice Maze

A frozen labyrinth rises above a sunken ship graveyard, forming a two-layered biome filled with danger and secrets. Explore twisting corridors, collapsed decks, hidden chambers, and the silent wrecks buried beneath the ice.

Structures & Atmosphere

From abandoned camps to massive frozen wrecks, every corner of the biome offers places to explore and stories to uncover. Custom music, eerie ambient sounds, and drifting snow turn each expedition into an atmospheric journey.

Creatures Beneath the Ice

Terrifying spawn of the abyss have risen to the surface, driving local raider flotillas into hiding. These creatures don’t simply inhabit the maze – they spill out from beneath the ice, pushing anyone who dares approach into the most remote corners in search of safety.

Captain Cornelia

The ghostly captain guards the heart of the ship graveyard with fluid animations and deadly abilities. Her tragic story unfolds through the environment and the treasures she leaves behind.

Treasure & Customization

Discover unique weapons, armor sets with special bonuses, and rare trinkets scattered throughout the biome. With full config support, you can fine-tune generation, difficulty, loot, and every feature to fit your world perfectly.


Aquamirae Delight by tinfoilknight

Aquamirae Delight is a compatibility mod for Farmer's Delight and Aquamirae. It introduces new dishes and enhanced recipes while staying true to the themes, ingredients, and gameplay style of both mods, preserving a cohesive vanilla-like experience.
